scenarios.name: Todo list with optimistic add and rollback
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useSWR + mutate with optimisticData, rollbackOnError, and revalidate options exactly as the skill documents; baseline uses local useState or naive fetch without SWR's optimistic mutate signature.

scenarios.name: Infinite scroll feed using SWR
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useSWRInfinite with the (index) => key function, setSize for pagination, and flatMap to accumulate pages as per the skill; baseline reaches for manual page state with useSWR rather than useSWRInfinite.
